zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Burdett於1435年出生在英國瓦維其可爾阿洛時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Burdett48歲，母親Joan Bruyn54歲。他於從1456年1月10日到1457年1月9日與Agnes Waldiff在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾阿洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1477年在英國英格蘭倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Burdett于1435年出生在英国瓦維其可爾阿洛时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Burdett48岁，母亲Joan Bruyn54岁。他于从1456年1月10日到1457年1月9日与Agnes Waldiff在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾阿洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1477年在英国英格兰倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Burdett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands, of Norman origin): perhaps from an Old French personal name Burdet, a pet form of an unrecorded ancient Germanic name, Burdo, or from Gaulish burdo ‘mule’.

variants.name: Burditt
meanings: English (Northamptonshire and Leicestershire, of Norman origin): variant of   Burdett  .

variants.name: Burdette
meanings: Altered form of French Burdet, a cognate of Burdin . Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

variants.name: Burden
meanings: (southern England, of Norman origin): from a diminutive of the ancient Germanic personal name Burdo, for which compare Burdett . Burdonus and other derivatives of the Gaulish personal name Burdo (‘mule’) are found in France, where it is rare and the similar French surname may derive instead from Old French bourdon in the sense ‘pilgrim's staff’ (compare Bourdon 1). The personal name, whether of ancient Germanic or Gaulish origin, does occur in medieval England, but rarely.

habitational name from any of various places called Burdon or Burden. Burden in Yorkshire and Great Burdon in County Durham are named with Old English burh ‘stronghold, fortified place’ + dūn ‘hill’; Burdon in Tyne and Wear is named with Old English b̄re ‘byre’ + denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Burdett was born in 1435, in Arrow, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Burdett, was 48 and his mother, Joan Bruyn, was 54. He married Agnes Waldiff from 10 January 1456 to 9 January 1457, in Arrow, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1477, in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Agnes Waldiff du 10 janvier 1456 au 9 janvier 1457, à Arrow, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1477, à Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Burdettが1435年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアローで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Burdettは48歳，母Joan Bruynは54歳であった。から1456年1月10日まで1457年1月9日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアローでAgnes Waldiffと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1477年にイギリスイギリスロンドンチリスト チャーチ グレイフリアルズ ニューガトで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンチリスト チャーチ グレイフリアルズ ニューガトにて埋葬された。

ko.Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate Street,: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트
ko.Newgate, London, Greater London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Burdett(이)가 1435년 영국 워윅실르 아로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Burdett(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Bruyn(은)는 54세였다. 그는 1456년 1월 10일부터 1457년 1월 9일까지 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 아로에서 Agnes Waldiff(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Burdett nasceu em 1435, em Arrow, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Burdett, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bruyn, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Waldiff de 10 de janeiro de 1456 a 9 de janeiro de 1457, em Arrow, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1477, em Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Burdett родился в 1435 г. в местности арроу, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Burdett было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bruyn, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Waldiff с 10 января 1456 по 9 января 1457 в местности арроу, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1477 г. в местности краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
